product: Databricks Runtime 17.3 LTS and Databricks Runtime 17.3 LTS ML are in Beta
tagline: Databricks Runtime 17.3 LTS and Databricks Runtime 17.3 LTS ML are now in Beta, powered by Apache Spark 4.0.0.
what_it_does: Databricks Runtime 17.3 LTS and Databricks Runtime 17.3 LTS ML are now in Beta, powered by Apache Spark 4.0.0. The release includes new configuration options, improved error handling, and enhanced Spark Connect support.
why_it_matters: The release includes new configuration options, improved error handling, and enhanced Spark Connect support.
plain_summary: Databricks Runtime 17.3 LTS and Databricks Runtime 17.3 LTS ML are now in Beta, powered by Apache Spark 4.0.0. The release includes new configuration options, improved error handling, and enhanced Spark Connect support.
key_takeaway: Databricks Runtime 17.3 LTS and Databricks Runtime 17.3 LTS ML are now in Beta, powered by Apache Spark 4.0.0.
